meta.title: Diabetes sponsor–drug–condition network
assumptions: The condition is specified as diabetes, which is used to filter the trials.
meta.interpretation_notes: This network graph visualizes the relationships between sponsors, drugs, and conditions related to diabetes, based on a total of 1000 studies fetched. The graph consists of 2619 nodes and 5422 edges, illustrating the complex interactions within this domain.
